user.title: ESP32-C6 ZBOSS adapter for ZHA
user.description: This adds ZBOSS as a radio type to Home Assistant's ZHA integration. There is nothing to configure — select Submit to activate the compatibility patches. Afterwards, add (or re-open) the Zigbee Home Automation integration and pick ZBOSS as the radio type.

abort.single_instance_allowed: Already set up. Only a single instance is needed — the patches are applied process-wide.
